name: SQL Server I/O / corruption errors
description: Storage and consistency errors (823/824/825), logical-consistency I/O errors, torn pages, bad checksums and CHECKDB/DBCC reported corruption. Treat as urgent - data integrity may be at risk.
query: _msg:~"(Error: 82[345][,. ]|logical consistency-based I/O error|incorrect checksum|torn page|detected a logical consistency|consistency errors in|allocation errors)"
